summary: Added Pattern C structure and documentation. Fixed transitivity proof errors. 10 sorries remain in DensityFrameCondition.lean reflexive cluster cases that require well-founded iteration. CantorApplication.lean 3 sorries depend on DensityFrameCondition completion.

artifacts.summary: Added Pattern C section, fixed canonicalR_transitive usage, created wrapper theorems
Iteration 5 progress with Pattern C structure

partial_progress.details: Pattern C documentation and wrapper theorems added. Core sorries in reflexive cluster cases remain. Mathematical proof is sound but formal iteration not yet implemented.

completion_data.completion_summary: Added Pattern C structure for strict density proof. Fixed transitivity proof errors using canonicalR_transitive. 13 sorries remain (10 in DensityFrameCondition, 3 in CantorApplication) - all in reflexive cluster cases requiring well-founded iteration.

next_steps: Implement fuel-based iteration with Nat.strongRecOn and prove fuel sufficiency via subformula count bound
